svg.text: How 15 AI agents build software. 7 built so far. 75 bugs caught before runtime.

g.text: ⚑ No spec leaves SD without Marko confirming his analysis (Checkpoint 1)
✓ No task is done without 3 sign-offs (QA + CR + DOC)
🔍 The coder and the reviewer are never the same agent
🛠 Same tool never built twice across subsystems if MTM can absorb it
⚠ Missing rationale = not a decision, just a guess
RostadVM · github.com/murtsu/RostadVM · Apache 2.0 · one human + fifteen AI agents · the duck is watching
